---
title: "André Batista"
subtitle: "Professor Assistente · DEE/UFMG"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: assets/images/bio-photo.jpg
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: E-mail
      href: mailto:andre-costa@ufmg.br
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/andre-batista
    - icon: mortarboard
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=a00NW34AAAAJ&hl=pt-BR
    - icon: award
      text: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0001-5954-9880
    - icon: file-earmark-text
      text: CV Lattes
      href: http://lattes.cnpq.br/2956055711847042
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/andre-cb
    - icon: bluesky
      text: Bluesky
      href: https://bsky.app/profile/wmwandre.bsky.social
    - icon: building
      text: ORCS Lab
      href: https://orcslab.github.io/
---

::: {.lang-pt}
Sou Professor Assistente do [Departamento de Engenharia Elétrica (DEE)](https://dee.ufmg.br/) da [Universidade Federal de Minas Gerais (UFMG)](https://ufmg.br/) e integrante do [Laboratório de Pesquisa Operacional e Sistemas Complexos (ORCS Lab)](https://orcslab.github.io/). Também atuo como membro do Colegiado do Curso de Graduação em Engenharia de Sistemas da UFMG.

Leciono para o curso de graduação em Engenharia de Sistemas. Coordeno pesquisas nas área de engenharia de sistemas, otimização e imageamento em microondas. Integro projetos de extensão como cursos e Pesquisa & Desenvolvimento.
:::

::: {.lang-en}
I am an Assistant Professor at the [Department of Electrical Engineering (DEE)](https://dee.ufmg.br/) of the [Federal University of Minas Gerais (UFMG)](https://ufmg.br/) and a member of the [Operations Research and Complex Systems Laboratory (ORCS Lab)](https://orcslab.github.io/). I also serve as a member of the undergraduate Systems Engineering program board at UFMG.

I teach in the undergraduate Systems Engineering program. I coordinate research in systems engineering, optimization, and microwave imaging. I am involved in extension projects including courses and Research & Development initiatives.
:::
